case_title: ABRAHAM CETINA VS. ASO-STEPS OF ROME, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CETINA, ABRAHAM AS TO DEFENDANT ASO-STEPS OF ROME, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA STEPS OF ROME TRATTORIA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CETINA, ABRAHAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASO-STEPS OF ROME, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA STEPS OF ROME TRATTORIA $8,809.73 PRINCIPAL, $14.14 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,048.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
